interaction_phrase: Aisin Group, Airbus, BMW Group, Equinor, and Goldman Sachs count among QC
occurrence_sentence: QC Ware is already generating revenue from research collaborations in a range of sectors, from aerospace, automotive, and financial services to manufacturing, material design, and oil and gas, as well as U.S. federal organizations. Aisin Group, Airbus, BMW Group, Equinor, and Goldman Sachs count among QC Ware's customers.
